name: Chrome DevTools MCP (example skeleton)
author: Symphony
description: Phase 9D SKELETON — interactive control of the USER's live logged-in Chrome via CDP. requires:host-browser-control forces hardcoded Tier 3, act-only, away-disabled, automation-rejected (all enforced for free by capabilities.ts). Declares a realistic navigate/click/screenshot tool surface, but every handler is a non-functional stub. The highest-risk surface in the browser stack — see README.md for the FULL mandatory envelope before shipping a real build.
